reason: Where flows/ vs handlers/ vs prompts/ live; the flow body goes in flows/breakdownTask.ts and must follow the layer split.
Firestore path convention (apps/gitsync/repos/{repoId}/tasks/{taskId}), pre-generating doc IDs, transactional batch write for Step 4-6.
HttpsError codes (invalid-argument/internal), best-effort pattern, Rule D (mark idempotency before slow OpenAI call) — flow must not mask the handler's lock release.
v2-only, region asia-east1, forbidden patterns; OpenAI structured-output via parse + zodResponseFormat.
Use firebase-functions structured logger for the flow steps.
StatefulWidget setState rules — root cause of the add_todo button bug (onChanged not calling setState).
Documents the setState gotcha and Flutter input/UI conventions for the input-box change.
Data flows backend BreakdownTaskResult -> SubTask.fromMap; keep dependsOn string[] contract consistent across the layer boundary.
